tasks.label: Start Backend
args: $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { Write-Host 'Stopping existing process on port 5000...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; $conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep 2 }; cd '${workspaceFolder}/backend/WerewolvesAPI'; dotnet run

tasks.label: Start Angular
args: $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4200 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { Write-Host 'Stopping existing process on port 4200...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; $conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep 2 }; cd '${workspaceFolder}/frontend/werewolves-app'; npm start
